panelsummary 0.1.3
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Adding Rows to a panelsummary Table
    • Using panelsummary with fixest
  • Changelog

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

panelsummary 0.1.3

CRAN release: 2026-03-20

  • clean_raw now includes a booktabs and linesep argument that will be passed directly into kableExtra::kbl
  • Small bug fixes for fixest attribute names introduced in fixest v0.14.0 (Thank you lrberge.)

panelsummary 0.1.2

CRAN release: 2023-08-13

  • New pretty_num argument for large numbers with commas.

panelsummary 0.1.1

CRAN release: 2023-03-15

  • Updated to fix modelsummary 1.3 breaking change update. Package now depends on modelsummary version 1.3 and above.

panelsummary 0.1.0

CRAN release: 2022-12-20

  • Added a NEWS.md file to track changes to the package.

On this page

Developed by Michael Topper.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
